---
title: "STAT 293 Final Project Model"
author: "Nancy Lopez"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# packages 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(mice)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(survival)
library(lme4)
library(nlme)
library(JM)
```

# data 

```{r}
load("/Users/nancylopez/Downloads/heart.rdata")
```

# LMM 

```{r}
#data <- heart_data %>%
#  filter(time < fuyrs)

# confounders are PRE TREATMENT (operation) covariates that impact both exposure and outcome 
# fuyrs starts POST treatment
# status is POST treatment 
# grad/log.grad is POST treatment
# ef is POST treatment 
# size is a MEDIATOR, not confounder
# con.cabg is not a confounder given the literature 
# creat was giving me issues 

lme_full <- lme(
  fixed = log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv + acei + hs + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data)

```

# survival 

```{r}
jm_data <- heart_data[!duplicated(heart_data$num), ]

cox_full <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE,
  model = TRUE
)

summary(cox_full)
```

# joint 

```{r}
joint_full <- jointModel(
  lme_full,
  cox_full,
  timeVar = "time",
  method = "piecewise-PH-aGH"
)

summary(joint_full)
```

# change in estimate rule 

```{r}
alpha_full <- joint_full$coefficients$alpha
alpha_full
```


## sex 

```{r}
lme_no_sex <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_sex <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_sex <- jointModel(lme_no_sex, cox_no_sex, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_sex <- jm_no_sex$coefficients$alpha
alpha_no_sex

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_sex - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## age 

```{r}
lme_no_age <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex  + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_age <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_age <- jointModel(lme_no_age, cox_no_age, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_age <- jm_no_age$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_age - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## bsa 

```{r}
lme_no_bsa <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age  + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_bsa <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_bsa <- jointModel(lme_no_bsa, cox_no_bsa, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_bsa <- jm_no_bsa$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_bsa - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## lvh 

```{r}
lme_no_lvh <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv + acei + hs + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_lvh <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_lvh <- jointModel(lme_no_lvh, cox_no_lvh, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_lvh <- jm_no_lvh$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_lvh - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## prenyha

```{r}
lme_no_prenyha <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_prenyha <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_prenyha <- jointModel(lme_no_prenyha, cox_no_prenyha, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_prenyha <- jm_no_prenyha$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_prenyha - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```


## redo 

```{r}
lme_no_redo <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + dm + lv + acei + hs + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_redo <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + dm + lv + acei + 
    sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_redo <- jointModel(lme_no_redo, cox_no_redo, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_redo <- jm_no_redo$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_redo - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## dm 

```{r}
lme_no_dm <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + lv + acei + hs + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_dm <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_dm <- jointModel(lme_no_dm, cox_no_dm, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_dm <- jm_no_dm$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_dm - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## lv

```{r}
lme_no_lv <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + acei + hs + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_lv <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + acei + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_lv <- jointModel(lme_no_lv, cox_no_lv, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_lv <- jm_no_lv$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_lv - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## acei 

```{r}
lme_no_acei <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv  + hs + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_acei <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + sten.reg.mix + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_acei <- jointModel(lme_no_acei, cox_no_acei, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_acei <- jm_no_acei$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_acei - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## sten.reg.mix


```{r}
lme_no_sten.reg.mix <- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv  + acei + hs,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_sten.reg.mix <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + hs + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_sten.reg.mix <- jointModel(lme_no_sten.reg.mix, cox_no_sten.reg.mix, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_sten.reg.mix <- jm_no_sten.reg.mix$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_sten.reg.mix - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

## hs 


```{r}
lme_no_hs<- lme(
  log.lvmi ~ time + hs + sex + age + bsa + lvh + 
    prenyha + redo + dm + lv  + acei + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data
)

cox_no_hs<- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ sex + age + bsa + lvh + prenyha + 
    redo + dm + lv + acei + sten.reg.mix + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE
)

jm_no_hs <- jointModel(lme_no_hs, cox_no_hs, timeVar = "time")

alpha_no_hs <- jm_no_hs$coefficients$alpha

percent_change <- abs(alpha_no_hs - alpha_full) / abs(alpha_full) * 100
if (percent_change > 5) {
  print("KEEP ‚Äî confounder")
} else {
  print("DROP‚Äî not confounding")
}
```

# simple model 

```{r}
lme_small <- lme(
  fixed = log.lvmi ~ time + age + dm + sex + lv + sten.reg.mix,
  random = ~ time | num,
  data = heart_data)

jm_data <- heart_data[!duplicated(heart_data$num), ]

cox_small <- coxph(
  Surv(fuyrs, status) ~ age + dm + sex + lv + sten.reg.mix + cluster(num),
  data = jm_data,
  x = TRUE,
  model = TRUE
)

joint_small <- jointModel(
  lme_small,
  cox_small,
  timeVar = "time",
  method = "piecewise-PH-aGH"
)

summary(joint_small)
summary(joint_full)
```
